title: More RPG Library
description: Library for the More RPG Classes & More RPG Content Series.
body:
![Title](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1301/275/mrpg-lib_title-png.png) ***      **[![](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-fabric|neoforge-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-rpg-library)  [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu)  [![Kofi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Elemental-Wizards)** ***

🚨Required Mods

\- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine) (+ all Dependencies of Spell Engine!) \- [Spell Power Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-power) *** ### 🌟**Features** \-On its own this Mod does not add spells, you need to install the class mods you want to add spells to your game \- This mod is used mainly as a library for the More RPG Classes & Content Series Mods \- Unique EntityAttributes used by different RPG Classes \- New Status Effects used by different RPG Classes More information about the library can be found [here](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/More-RPG-Library/blob/1.21.1/README.md). *** ### **🧙‍♂️Check out my RPG themed Mods using this Library** [![Archers Expansion](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/709/archers_expansion_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers-expansion)[![Berserker](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/710/berserker_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class)[![Elemental Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/711/elemental_wizards_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-wizards-rpg) [![Forcemaster](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/712/forcemaster_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class)[![Witcher](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/713/witcher_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/witcher-rpg-class) *** ### **Want to play more RPG content? Check out the RPG Series Mods created by Daedelus!** [![Archers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/169/archers_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers) [![Paladins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/170/paladins_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests) [![Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/171/wizards_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) [![Rogues](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/332/rogues_full_bg_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors) [![Jewelry](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/760/387/jewelry_full_275.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) [![Relics](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/296/relics_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/relics-rpg) [![Arsenal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/295/arsenal_full_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal-rpg-series) [![Armory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/866/armory_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/armory-rpg-series) [![Skill Tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/865/skilltree_275-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skill-tree) *** ### **Check out more RPG-Content created by other Spell Engine Dev's** [![Anarchy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1358/177/anarchy-png.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/anarchy-rpg) [![Mercenaries and Artificers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1346/857/merc_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mercenaries-and-artificers)  [![Death Knigths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/953/998/death_knights_275_2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights) ***
